summary.summary: Moves the global “Snooze All” UI out of a hidden long-press on the home glucose bobble into Settings → Notifications as a visible button that opens an inline sheet offering four canonical durations (15 min / 1 hr / 3 hrs / 6 hrs) which call TrioAlertManager.applySnooze(for:). Deletes the Snooze module and its .snooze route. Removes the legacy SwiftMessages alert pipeline and the SwiftMessages SwiftPM dependency, and routes remaining alert callers through TrioAlertManager (explicitly migrating calibration stale-glucose, Garmin-connect-missing, and two CGM-settings open-failed warnings). Extracts TimeInterval convenience helpers from the deleted Snooze code into Trio/Sources/Helpers/TimeInterval+Convenience.swift. Changes Logger.info() to be log-only (removes its banner side‑effect).
summary.userFacingImpact: Snooze All is now accessed from Settings → Notifications instead of long-pressing the home glucose bobble; the old Snooze module (including the 20‑minute option) is removed and replaced by the new 15/60/180/360‑minute choices. In‑app alert/banner delivery is consolidated through TrioAlertManager (the legacy SwiftMessages path and its dependency are removed), so some alerts’ presentation/dispatch path has changed. These changes affect alert routing and the visible Snooze UI and should be validated in QA (visual/behavioral checks) before release.
